text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On the way back from a walk, I run<n>into
Matikanetannhauser and some<n>of her friends, and
we all head back<n>to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Geez... I can't believe I ended up<n>nodding off
during hide-and-seek...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. We were playing with some<n>kids as part of
our volunteer work.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I ended up falling asleep in the<n>middle of the
game...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to get so down<n>about it!
Everyone looked like they<n>were having a great
time.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But Tannhauser, I have to ask, where<n>the heck did
you hide?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Even after the kids left, we still<n>couldn't find you.
We were panicking,<n>thinking something had
happened to<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I heard we were gonna play<n>hide-and-seek at the
park, so I went<n>ahead and scoped out the best
spots<n>beforehand.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wait, don't tell me...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Is that notebook filled with hiding<n>places?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I don't get it, though. I thought I'd<n>picked a spot
where even a kid<n>should be able to find me
easily...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Wait!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Could it be that I'm so normal and<n>boring that the
kids just forgot about<n>me?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Um, no... I really think it's just that<n>you hid too
well...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this is no good at all! I've got to<n>become an
Umamusume brimming<n>with character so nobody
will forget<n>me again!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Um! I think you're fine and<n>memorable just the
way you are!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the vote of confidence!<n>But it's
okay—I'm determined to be<n>better!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So, this is where I ask you, the<n>professional
trainer, to give me some<n>advice.
choice_data_list:
Maybe you should discuss this with other
Umamusume.
I think you're fine as you are.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You're so right! Tracen Academy isfull of unique Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll go talk to them!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Uniqueness, you say? Ah, I see... you<n>long to be
even a fraction as<n>remarkable as myself, the great
T.M.<n>Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! Put those feelings into<n>song! Come, play
it for me! The aria<n>of your soul!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Um, okay—here goes! Oh, how I<n>praaaay! ♪ That I
will becooome a<n>unique Umamusumeeee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Well, th-that was a beautiful song,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Maybe that's not the best way todefine yourself, Tannhauser...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You wish to be unique? Hehe, what a<n>splendid
proposition! Here, I'll give<n>you my newest
concoction!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just one sip and you will transform<n>into a truly
magnificent being, one that<n>has transcended the
limits of an<n>Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Can it really do all that?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: STOOOOP!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That's too dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many times her<n>friends try to stop
her,<n>Matikanetannhauser's desire to<n>define
herself cannot be quelled.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Stay as I am? You mean "stay<n>ordinary and
boring"?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't call you ordinary per se...<n>but you're
wonderful just as you<n>are!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes! You're always hardworking and
straightforward, Tannhauser! You're<n>already the
best you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wowww! Thank you so much,<n>everyone!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Stay as I am, huh? Hehe. I'm feeling<n>pretty
confident all of a sudden.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So, instead of worrying about how to<n>be me... I
just need to keep trying my<n>best in my own way.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I gotta keep it simple and not<n>overthink it. Just
keep my eyes on<n>the prize and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Completely reinvent myself through<n>fashion and a
new haircut!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Why would you do that?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After that, the three of us desperately<n>try to stop
Matikanetannhauser from<n>choosing bizarre wigs
and clothes.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I see what you're doing... You're<n>trying to comfort
me, aren't you?!<n>That's such a kind gesture...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Can kindness be a unique<n>trait? Maybe
if I'm kind to enough<n>people...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Uh, Tannhauser?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Like helping people in trouble or<n>searching for lost
cats from missing<n>posters...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Um, don't you do that stuff already?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yes! I think that'll work! All right, it's<n>go time!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Thanks, everyone! I'm gonna<n>become super kind!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Um, Tannhauser?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: She ran off...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser runs off with<n>new resolve. A
short while later...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I found a cat and helped a bunch of<n>people, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Now that I stop and think about it,<n>helping people in
trouble is actually<n>pretty normal. I mean, any
average<n>girl would do the same.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I was trying to become<n>unique by
doing totally normal things...<n>What was I thinking?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This is so embarrassing. Butat least...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I got thanked by even more people<n>than usual
today! Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Though Matikanetannhauser seems<n>to think she
failed, there are no signs<n>of regret in her smile.
